column2: # Join R² to data for labeling in each facet
p_facets <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = pm25_epa, y = pm25_cinc)) +
# print the R² on each panel in the upper left
annotate("text", x = xy_lim[1] + diff(xy_lim)*0.03, y = xy_lim[2] - diff(xy_lim)*0.06,
hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 3, color = "black", check_overlap = TRUE) +
coord_equal(xlim = xy_lim, ylim = xy_lim, expand = FALSE) +
title = "CinC vs EPA Daily PM2.5 by EPA Site",
